text.message: Oj be a bro and trade me a wheat
I didn't have to trade you the plow
I think I've been robbed 10 times already
i mean... you did ruin greens game
I've been 0 cards the last 4 or 5 orbits
im ready to sell my soul to get one point
Tbf I probably shouldn't have given oj the plow
But I wanted to spite green cause he started soloing me lol
didn't know 100 4's would roll in a row
You can lose right beside me red
At least I won't be known as a cry baby who can't handle a little plowing
You destroy my game I do the same
blue do you understand the game
It's ok we're playing colonist Io it's very standard
Typical player, nothing else was expected
If this happens to you a lot. You sure it isn’t a you problem
just know we all thing you're in the wrong green
